prompt: A high-fidelity, wide-angle interior photograph capturing a surreal mixed-media scene inside a modern living room. The central figure is a man whose face matches the uploaded reference photo, wearing a bright yellow hoodie and black pants, seated in the middle of a plush light-gray sofa. The composition seamlessly fuses a photorealistic 3D environment with cel-shaded 2D anime and cartoon characters that physically inhabit the same space. To the man's right on the sofa, Nobita sits casually with a friendly wave. To his left, Doraemon leans against a pillow in a relaxed pose. On the white wall behind the sofa, two framed posters hang: one featuring Son Goku alongside Vegeta, the other featuring Trunks in a dynamic anime style. In the foreground, Shinchan lies sprawled on a textured gray carpet beside a small plate of dorayaki, while a chibi-style Son Goku strikes a triumphant pose atop a cream knit pouf. On the left side of the room, Vegeta stands tall and confident on a grooved wooden side table; near the wooden center coffee table, a miniature Trunks observes the scene with a curious expression. Soft natural daylight enters from the left through sheer curtains, producing gentle volumetric lighting that picks out the weave of the blanket, the grain of the tiered wooden table, and the leaves of a snake plant in the corner. The whole image is rendered in 8K with razor-sharp focus, vivid saturated colors, and a dreamy cinematic playful mood, a seamless crossover between the real world and the anime world, with no visible AI artifacts.
